title: bagassa tiliifolia
intro: Bagassa tiliifolia is a tropical plant species commonly known as the 'Brazilian ironwood' due to its incredibly hard and durable wood. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bagassa tiliifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's wood can be used to make resin, which is often used in traditional medicine, while its leaves and bark are also used in teas and infusions for various health benefits.
